title: quercus × exacta
intro: Quercus × exacta is a hybrid plant belonging to the Quercus genus, specifically a cross between Quercus robur and Quercus petraea, commonly known as the hybrid oak. The medicinal properties of Quercus × exacta include its high content of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × exacta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Quercus × exacta can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
